results.title: Lentil in Ayurveda: The Strength-Giving Dal That Nourishes Without Heaviness
results.description: In Sanskrit, lentil is commonly known as Masura. It has been used in traditional Indian food for centuries as a strengthening pulse. Ayurveda describes Masura as laghu and ruksha, meaning light and dry in quality. Its taste is mainly kashaya and madhura, astringent and mildly sweet. Because of this nature, it is useful for balancing excess Kapha and Pitta, while people with strong Vata tendency should cook it with enough ghee, warming spices and moisture. The post Lentil in Ayurveda: The Strength-Giving Dal That Nourishes Without Heaviness appeared first on Dharmakshethra - India Unabridged .

results.title: Fulford's pinch 2-run double in 8th lifts Rockies past Pirates 4-3, Freeland reaches 1,000 Ks
Varanasi Fire News: CNG Pump Area Blaze Triggers Panic in Varanasi
results.description: Panic spread across the Phulpur area of Varanasi after a massive fire broke out in a plastic pipe warehouse located near a CNG pump. The blaze intensified rapidly, engulfing the entire godown and sending towering flames and thick black smoke into the sky, causing chaos among nearby residents. Multiple fire brigade vehicles rushed to the scene after receiving information about the incident and launched an operation to bring the fire under control. Preliminary reports suggest that a short circuit may have triggered the blaze. Although there were fears of a possible CNG-related explosion due to the warehouse’s proximity to the fuel station, authorities have not confirmed any major blast. Fortunately, no casualties or injuries have been reported in the incident so far. The fire created widespread panic, but timely intervention by emergency responders helped prevent further damage and avert a larger disaster.

results.title: Pirates farm report for June 19, 2026: Termarr Johnson collects 4 hits in Indianapolis loss
results.description: INDIANAPOLIS (Triple A, 29-44) lost 11-7 to Iowa (Cubs). 2B Termarr Johnson (.201) went 4 for 6 with two doubles and a run scored. 3B Enmanuel Valdez (.254) went 2 for 4 with a double and a two-run homer, his seventh. 1B Nick Cimillo (.215) went 1 for 4 with a two-run homer, his sixth. SS Keiner Delgado (.212) went 1 for 4 with a walk, double, RBI and his third stolen base. RF Davis Wendzel (.246) went 2 for 4 with a double and RBI. CF Dominic Fletcher (.292) went 2 for 5 with an RBI. RHP Justin Meis (4.15) started a bullpen game and gave up two runs on three hits in 12⁄3 innings. LHP Hunter Barco (4.89) was touched up for four runs on five hits in 12⁄3 innings. LHP Nick Dombkowski (2-4, 7.54) allowed five runs on four hits, including two homers, in 12⁄3 innings to take the loss. RHP Noah Murdock (2.16) pitched two scoreless innings. RHP Beau Burrows (2.70) worked a scoreless eighth.

results.title: Argentine TV presenter resigns after falsely reporting death of Lionel Messi's father
results.description: The presenter said she had relied on information provided by her production team and accepted responsibility for repeating the claim without verification

results.title: Elderly Alekh follower bludgeoned to death
results.description: Keonjhar: An elderly follower of the Alekh faith was bludgeoned to death in Amuni village under Upara Raigoda panchayat within Keonjhar Sadar police limits Friday.
